title: 11 PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct Administration Functions
body_text:
11	PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct Administration Functions
11.1	Overview of PaymentStream Direct Administration Functions
PaymentStream
Direct allows authorized users to view archived tasks. Archived tasks provide detailed information on transactions for your financial institutionâs purposes (e.g., an audit trail of who worked on a transaction). Tasks are only created for transactions that involve the movement of money (e.g., bill payments). Requests such as setting up a payee or customer alert arenât available through
PaymentStream
Administration.
Note:	General transaction details can be viewed via the Account Activity function. See Section 7.4, Account Activity, for more information.
Access to the archive is based on the userâs permissions. For example, access to the PSD-Bill Payment function, as set on CPS Admin, allows the user to create bill payments and access the archive. For more information, see Section 5.2, PaymentStream Direct â CPS Admin Application IDs Table.
11.2	Viewing Archived Tasks
The
PaymentStream
Direct archive provides transaction details and an audit trail of who worked on the transaction (i.e., the transaction history). Data is stored for 18 months. To search for archived tasks, the
PaymentStream
Direct user must have permission to access the function associated with the task.
To view archived tasks.
Go to the Administration tab and select
Archived Tasks
in the navigation menu.
Enter search criteria and select
Search
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Search for Archived Tasks
The search results are displayed at the bottom of the page. To download a file of the search results in CSV format, select the CSV icon. To view the Archived Task Details, select the status link (e.g., Completed) beside the appropriate task. See Figure 2 and Figure 3.
Figure 2: View Archived Tasks
Figure 3: Archived Task Details
END
